topic: Saturday SecondBrain — Obsidian + Claude Code 365-day knowledge system D+10
caption:
Your SecondBrain, ready in 5 minutes ✷

Saturday = SecondBrain.

3 STEPS, that is it:

- STEP 2: Organize (3m) — PARA folders + tags + backlinks
- STEP 3: AI search (1m) — Claude Code instant recall

1 note + 1 link = 1-sec recall after 365 days.
